name: web-summary
description: Fetches a web page and produces an LLM-generated summary
author: OS Loop

name: text-transform
description: Transforms text between cases and formats
author: OS Loop

name: git-status-checker
description: Checks the current git repository status via bridge command execution
author: OS Loop

name: file-indexer
description: Indexes files in a directory, with optional bridge filesystem for enhanced access
author: OS Loop

name: macos-shortcuts
description: Runs macOS Shortcuts app automations via bridge command execution
author: OS Loop

name: project-tracker
description: Tracks projects through planning, execution, and review phases with structured artifacts and approval workflows
author: OS Loop

name: note-organizer
description: Captures, tags, and retrieves notes with optional workspace persistence for cross-session organization
author: OS Loop

name: quick-calculator
description: Evaluates mathematical expressions and unit conversions without any persistent state
author: OS Loop
